site.title: Kasumbu kaludiki ka mu matunga a bungi bua mushindu wa kupeta mikanda
site.tagline: Bidi bikengela kuikala ne mushindu wa kubuelamu bua kupeta mikanda ya bantu bonso
nav.label: Tshia kumpala
skip.toContent: Pingana ku malu adi mu tshiena-bualu
hero.home.eyebrow: Dibuela mu mikanda ya bantu bonso (Open Source Accessibility)
meta.home.description: IATF udi ukudimuna majinga malelela a mushindu wa kupeta mikanda mu mikanda ya bantu bonso.
meta.projects.description: Tangila malu adibu bapatula kudi bantu ku diambuluisha dia tshibambalu tshia IATF.
meta.propose.description: Lomba IATF bua kukupesha mukanda ku Enternete, ku email anyi ku Discord.
meta.governance.description: Bala mushindu udi IATF witaba midimu, ulombola bintu bidibu balama, ne wenza bua mudimu wende wikale wa bantu bonso.
meta.join.description: Mushindu wa kubuela mu IATF: kufila kode, kukudimuna, kuteta, anyi kulama mudimu.
meta.accessibility.description: Mmushindu kayi udi IATF ujinga bua site eu ikale wikalaku ne mushindu wa kumanyisha bualu budi bupangisha bantu bua kubuela mu site eu?
meta.transparency.description: Mikanda ya bantu bonso ya IATF: mapangadika, midimu, ne malu adibu bajadike adi ashala anu matoke.
actions.emailProjects: Kutumina mesaje ku Enternete bua midimu idibu balue nayi
registry.empty.title: Kakuena mudimu udibu banji kupatula to
registry.empty.body: Tshibambalu tshidibu babikila ne: IATF tshidi tshilongolola mudimu wabu wa kumpala bua bantu bonso.
proposal.form.title: Tuma dilomba
proposal.form.body: Kuwuja dibeji didi kuinshi eku bua kutumina bena IATF dilomba.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript mmukumbane bua kuenza mudimu ne dibeji edi dia ku Enternete.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Kufila kua muoyo kakuena kujadika mu muaba eu to. Tshikebelu etshi netshikangule email webe.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Ndi ndilongolola bua kufila tshimuenenu tshimpe...
proposal.form.ready: Paudi utuma dilomba edi, IATF neafike ku dienza dileta.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Suaku ukonkonone malu adibu bafunde bua kudikuba ku malu adi kaayi malomba diambuluisha kumpala kua kuatumina.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Dibalama dia malu adi kaayi malomba diakapita matuku. Suaku ukonkonone kabidi kumpala kua kutuma.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Katuena mua kujadika malu adi atangila disulakana dia mesaje to. Teta tshiakabidi.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Tshikebelu tshia malu adi kaayi malomba tshidi tshijika, suaku uteta kabidi.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Suaku ujikije malu adibu balomba kumpala kua kutuma.
proposal.form.success: Tuvua bapete dilomba diebe ne tuvua badilamine bua tuetu kudikonkonona.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Wewe mupingane kabidi kudi IATF bua dilomba edi, umvuija tshidibu bafunde kuinshi eku.
proposal.form.successRecordLabel: Malu adibu bafunde adi atangila bintu bidibu babuelamu
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Bualu kampanda buakanyanguka paudi utuma dilomba edi. Teta kabidi. Bikala tshilumbu etshi tshitungunuke, utume mesaje ku Enternete.
proposal.field.optional: Malu adibu kabayi ne bua kuenza
project.detail.eyebrow: Kubuela mu programe wa bantu bonso
project.detail.problemTitle: Mudimu eu udi ujikija tshilumbu kayi?
project.detail.whyTitle: Bua tshinyi tudi tuenza mudimu eu
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: Kabena mu tshitupa tshia mudimu eu to
project.detail.field.lastUpdated: Tshivuabu bajadike bua musangu wa ndekelu
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Tshimfuanyi tshia mu Anglais mupepele, badi mua kutshivuija pashishe
footer.label: Tshitupa tshia kuinshi kua dibeji dia site
footer.blurb: Mudimu wa diambuluishangana udi ne bua kuikala mupepele bua kuwutangila, kuwupatula ne kuwulama.
footer.source: Mifundu idi yakula bua mikenji ya mushindu wa kupeta mikanda: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Bienzedi bia bantu badi benza mudimu ne biamu bidi biambuluisha.
contact.label: Muntu wa kutuilangana nende
project.status.seeking-maintainer: Badi bakeba muntu udi mua kubalama
translation.label: Tshikondo tshia dikudimuna
translation.source: Tshingeleshi ke muakulu wa ku ntuadijilu wa dibeji edi.
translation.humanReviewed: Muntu mukuabu udi wakula muakulu eu bimpe ke uvua mukonkonone nkudimuinu eu.
translation.machineAssisted: Nkudimuinu eu mmuenza ne biamu bidi biambuluisha bua kukudimuna ne ki mmukudimunabu bimpe kudi muntu udi mumanye kuakula bimpe to. Tudi tuitaba ngenyi idibu bafila ku diambuluisha dia GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Bakakonkonona nkudimuinu eu kumpala kua dikudimuna dia Bible wa Anglais mupiamupia, ne bidi bikengela kumukonkonona kabidi.
translation.report: Londa bualu bua dikudimuna: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Udi umvua bishi ?
